← Recipes

Roasted veggies

  • Cut into pieces, place in bowl with olive oil (and butter?)
  • Add some combination of: minced garlic, paprika, garlic powder, parmesan cheese, salt, pepper
  • Bake for 20 minutes at 425
  • Alternative, add parmesan cheese for the last 5 minutes

Recipe from Steve Vinter.

Recipe from Steve Vinter.
